title: Casting to real truncates to 32 bits, not casting causes internal fault

features.name: wide_to_real_cast
features.description: Code should include casting a wide register (greater than 32 bits) to real type using explicit cast syntax real'(...)

features.name: wide_to_real_implicit_conversion
features.description: Code should include implicit conversion of a wide register (greater than 32 bits) to real type without explicit cast
